moments.title: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles and Wings musician, Sir Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday on June 18th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles track he penned?

angles.name: Wings Era
angles.copy: From the Fab Four to Wings! Paul McCartney turns 84 tomorrow. Which of his post-Beatles hits is still on your playlist?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18th-21st, featuring headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Wet Leg, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Festival Start
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival starts tomorrow! Who are you most excited to see? Lewis Capaldi, Wet Leg, Calvin Harris, The Cure... what a line-up!

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: Rock, Pop, Dance legends all on one island! Isle of Wight Festival kicks off Thursday. Who's got your attention, from Wet Leg to The Cure?

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with performances from Nile Rodgers & CHIC (June 17), Elvis Costello & The Imposters (June 18), Sophie Ellis-Bextor (June 19), and 80s Classical (June 20).

angles.name: Tonight's Act
angles.copy: Tonight at Hampton Court Palace Festival: the legendary Nile Rodgers & CHIC! Who's heading down for some disco magic?

angles.name: Upcoming Acts
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible artists at Hampton Court Palace Festival this week! Elvis Costello, Sophie Ellis-Bextor, and 80s Classical are all performing.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival starts in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts TRNSMT Festival from June 19th-21st, featuring major acts like Richard Ashcroft, Wolf Alice, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: TRNSMT Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is ON for TRNSMT! Kicking off Friday in Glasgow Green with Richard Ashcroft, Wolf Alice and more. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Glasgow's about to get loud! TRNSMT Festival brings Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi and The Last Dinner Party to Scotland this weekend. What's your top pick?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20th.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Hello, is it his birthday you're looking for? Lionel Richie turns 77 on Thursday! What's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Get ready to party 'All Night Long'! The legendary Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday this week. Drop your favourite song in the comments!

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic pop, celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21st.

angles.name: Lana's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey on Friday! Which of her iconic tracks is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: Video Games
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to now, Lana Del Rey turns 41 this weekend. Celebrate her unique sound with us!

moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st at 09:24 BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Sunday marks the Summer Solstice – the longest day of the year! How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Midsummer Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for midsummer magic! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, bringing us the most daylight hours of 2026. What's your favourite summer activity?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Want
angles.copy: Girls (and guys!) just want to wish Cyndi Lauper a very Happy 73rd Birthday on Saturday! What's your favourite hit from the pop icon?

angles.name: Timeless Icon
angles.copy: A true legend turns 73 this weekend! Cyndi Lauper's music is timeless. Which of her songs always takes you back?

moments.title: Todd Rundgren's 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: American rock multi-instrumentalist, singer-songwriter, and producer Todd Rundgren celebrates his 78th birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to rock icon Todd Rundgren on Saturday! What's your favourite track from this incredibly versatile artist?

moments.title: Jimmy Somerville turns 65
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Jimmy Somerville, known for his work with Bronski Beat and The Communards, celebrates his 65th birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Star
angles.copy: Smalltown Boy, big voice! Happy 65th Birthday to the brilliant Jimmy Somerville on Saturday! What's your favourite Bronski Beat or Communards hit?

moments.title: Wimbledon Qualifying begins
moments.blurb: The qualifying rounds for The Championships, Wimbledon, kick off on Monday, June 22nd, leading up to the main tournament starting June 29th.

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The road to SW19 starts Monday! Wimbledon qualifying begins, as players battle for a spot in the main draw. Who are you hoping to see make it through?

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for some grass court action! Wimbledon qualifying starts Monday. It's almost time for strawberries and cream!

moments.title: Taylor Swift takes UK Singles Chart #1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift has secured her seventh UK #1 single with 'I Knew It, I Knew You', from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack, for the week ending June 18th.

angles.name: Swifties Celebrate
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is the new UK #1 single. Are you a Swiftie celebrating this latest chart-topper?

angles.name: New Number One
angles.copy: New UK Number 1! Taylor Swift takes the top spot with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'. What do you think of the new chart-topper?

moments.title: Love Island Series 13 underway
moments.blurb: The thirteenth series of the popular reality dating show Love Island has begun airing on ITV2, hosted by Maya Jama.

angles.name: Island Buzz
angles.copy: Are you glued to the screen? Love Island Series 13 is in full swing on ITV2! Who's your favourite islander so far?

angles.name: Daily Dose
angles.copy: Catching up on all the villa drama? Love Island is delivering the goods! What's been the biggest shocker this week?

moments.title: World Cup 2026 action continues
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is ongoing, with a daily Netflix series 'The Rest is Football' covering the action since June 10th.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup action is heating up! Who are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: Football Fix
angles.copy: Getting your daily football fix? The World Cup continues, with plenty of drama on and off the pitch!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival approaches
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival takes place from June 27th to July 4th, featuring Katy Perry, Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival is just around the corner! Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics - what a lineup!

angles.name: Grand Setting
angles.copy: Experience live music in a truly grand setting! Blenheim Palace Festival starts June 27th. Who are you planning to see?
